questions.prompt: Как правильно образовать Future Perfect для утверждения: 'К концу недели я закончу проект'?

choices.text: I will finish the project by the end of the week.
I will have finished the project by the end of the week.
I will be finishing the project by the end of the week.
I finish the project by the end of the week.

questions.explanation: Future Perfect требует структуры will have + V3. Вариант b соответствует правилу.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение правильно отрицает Future Perfect?

choices.text: They will not have completed the task by tomorrow.
They will not complete the task by tomorrow.
They will not be completing the task by tomorrow.
They will not have been completing the task by tomorrow.

questions.explanation: Отрицание Future Perfect строится как will not have + V3. Вариант a верен.

questions.prompt: Какой вопрос правильно использует Future Perfect?

choices.text: Will you finish the report by Friday?
Will you have finished the report by Friday?
Have you finished the report by Friday?
Will you be finishing the report by Friday?

questions.explanation: Вопросы с Future Perfect требуют переноса will перед подлежащим и структуры will have + V3. Вариант b правильный.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение правильно использует Future Perfect с 'by the time'?

choices.text: By the time we arrive, the meeting will have started.
By the time we arrive, the meeting will start.
By the time we arrive, the meeting will be starting.
By the time we arrive, the meeting starts.

questions.explanation: Future Perfect используется для действия, завершенного к определенному моменту. Вариант a верен.

questions.prompt: Какое утверждение содержит ошибку в Future Perfect?

choices.text: She will have written the book by next month.
They will have finished the work by 5 PM.
He will have been working for 10 hours by then.
We will have visited Paris by next year.

questions.explanation: Вариант c использует Future Perfect Continuous (will have been + V3-ing), а не Future Perfect.

questions.prompt: Как правильно образовать Future Perfect для отрицания: 'Они не завершат проект к концу месяца'?

choices.text: They will not complete the project by the end of the month.
They will not have completed the project by the end of the month.
They will not be completing the project by the end of the month.
They will not have been completing the project by the end of the month.

questions.explanation: Отрицание Future Perfect требует will not have + V3. Вариант b соответствует правилу.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует Future Perfect в вопросе?

choices.text: Will you complete the assignment by tomorrow?
Will you have completed the assignment by tomorrow?
Have you completed the assignment by tomorrow?
Will you be completing the assignment by tomorrow?

questions.explanation: Вопросы с Future Perfect требуют структуры will have + V3. Вариант b правильный.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение правильно использует Future Perfect с 'before'?

choices.text: Before he arrives, I will finish the meal.
Before he arrives, I will have finished the meal.
Before he arrives, I will be finishing the meal.
Before he arrives, I finish the meal.

questions.explanation: Future Perfect показывает завершение действия до другого момента. Вариант b верен.

questions.prompt: Какое утверждение содержит ошибку в структуре Future Perfect?

choices.text: By next year, they will have built the new school.
By next year, they will have been building the new school.
By next year, they will have completed the project.
By next year, they will have moved to a new house.

questions.explanation: Вариант b использует Future Perfect Continuous, а не Future Perfect.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение правильно отражает Future Perfect для 'мы'?

choices.text: We will finish the project by Friday.
We will have finished the project by Friday.
We will be finishing the project by Friday.
We finish the project by Friday.

questions.explanation: Future Perfect для всех лиц строится как will have + V3. Вариант b правильный.
